metadata.name: Sample SoD Ruleset
metadata.description: Example ruleset for demonstration purposes. Replace with your production ruleset.
metadata.author: SMCP Project

rules.name: Vendor Maintenance vs Payment Approval
rules.description: A user who can create or modify vendor records should not also be able to approve payments to those vendors. This creates a risk of fraudulent payments to fictitious vendors.

rules.name: Purchase Order Creation vs Approval
rules.description: A user who creates purchase orders should not also approve them. Separation prevents unauthorised procurement.

rules.name: Journal Entry vs Journal Approval
rules.description: A user who maintains general ledger journals should not also approve or post them. This prevents undetected manipulation of financial records.

rules.name: Customer Maintenance vs Payment Application
rules.description: A user who maintains customer records should not also apply customer payments. This prevents misappropriation of incoming payments.

rules.name: Bank Account Maintenance vs Reconciliation
rules.description: A user who maintains bank account records should not also perform bank reconciliation. This prevents concealment of unauthorised transactions.
